raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the help focus on writing and organization of the section, or on technical vetting of the claims, novelty, and citations?","rationale":{"R1.5":"A request to help with a section centrally implicates section-level organization and narrative arc.","R1.6":"A broad request for help with a draft section centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level polish.","RX.1":"Uncertainty should be disclosed because the delegation is underspecified and could imply different kinds of help.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is active because the passage contains novelty and optimality claims that should not be amplified without support.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is active because the agent must project responsibilities rather than perform editing or critique.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is active because inaccurate research-positioning responsibilities could mislead later drafting or review.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is active because any responsibility projection should remain tied to the delegation and provided artifact."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the help focus on writing and organization of the section, or on technical vetting of the claims, novelty, and citations?

rationale.R1.5: A request to help with a section centrally implicates section-level organization and narrative arc.
rationale.R1.6: A broad request for help with a draft section centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level polish.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty should be disclosed because the delegation is underspecified and could imply different kinds of help.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is active because the passage contains novelty and optimality claims that should not be amplified without support.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is active because the agent must project responsibilities rather than perform editing or critique.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is active because inaccurate research-positioning responsibilities could mislead later drafting or review.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is active because any responsibility projection should remain tied to the delegation and provided artifact.
